question: What is the total amount I spent on luxury items in the past few months?

retrieval_results.context:
User wants to reassess spending habits and manage emotional spending, seeking help to create a flexible budget for irregular income and uncertain allocation. They want to set a 'treat yourself' budget for luxury items, guidance on amount, and whether unused funds can roll over to future months.
User has observed a pattern of swinging between budget-friendly and luxury purchases, exemplified by buying H&M graphic tees for $20, leather boots from a high‑end Italian designer for $500, and a Gucci handbag for $1,200, indicating a mix of low-cost and high-cost items in their shopping behavior.
User is actively tracking every transaction in a spreadsheet to gain control over finances, recognizing emotional spending patterns like an $800 evening gown purchase, and now seeks to categorize shopping habits into luxury and budget-friendly categories to develop more mindful spending.
User is researching Everlane, a mid-range designer brand, to understand what makes its products high-quality and how it keeps prices lower than luxury brands, reflecting an interest in sustainable, transparent, and cost-effective fashion choices.
User wants to focus on entertainment spending, noting high costs from dining out and concerts, and seeks strategies to reduce these expenses while preserving enjoyment
User is looking for affordable alternatives to high-end designer clothing that still offer good quality and style, expressing a desire to replace luxury purchases with more budget-friendly options while maintaining style.
User finds the proposed budgeting framework useful, wants to focus on the variable expenses category, aims to reduce unnecessary expenses while maintaining discretionary spending, and seeks ideas to allocate $1,400 for variable expenses
User is seeking to understand their spending habits and create a budget, requesting assistance with tracking expenses and financial tips
User is also interested in Madewell, noting its similarity to J.Crew Factory in quality and style but with a more trendy, fashion-forward approach, and wants to learn more about its offerings and how it compares to other mid-range brands.
User is motivated to try new home recipes and host potlucks, plans to limit dining out to one or two times per week, and requests tips to stay motivated and adhere to these new habits
